reason: Provenance gap: the step R(I)=I depends on the load-bearing bare fact 'C(-1/2,0)=1' (it isolates the k=0 term of R=sum_k C(-1/2,k)U^k, all higher terms vanishing since U(I)=0). This binomial-coefficient value has no refs/ ground-truth source: the only candidate, GT-binomial-series, is self-flagged in 'af externals' as 'PROVENANCE GAP: no standalone analysis source in refs/'. It is derivable from the GT-binomial-series identity by t=0 substitution, but that identity itself lacks refs/ provenance, so the chain bottoms out in an uncited fact. Per the project rule (no 'standard facts'), C(-1/2,0)=1 needs a cited refs/ source or an explicit derivation from one. NOTE: the node's mathematics is otherwise fully valid (S(I)=I, S^2(I)=I, U(I)=0, R_N(I)=I for every partial sum, sgn(S)(I)=I, P(I)=I) and its conclusion P(I)=I is independently confirmed at refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:2180 (within GT-kitaev-spectral locus 2171-2182). Phi(I)=I is properly provenanced via the unitality definition at refs/idel-2013/idel-2013.md:348. Severity minor: the gap is in citation, not correctness.
